title: No Stone Left Alone
label: 2024 Event
cardDescription: Grassroots movement for youth in Canada to participate in a meaningful act of Remembrance. 5 photos.
heroDescription: Grassroots movement for youth in Canada to participate in a meaningful act of Remembrance.
galleryDescription: Cadets in formation, wreath presentations, and moments of remembrance captured during the outdoor ceremony.

photos.alt: Cadets carrying wreaths during the remembrance ceremony on an autumn day
Cadets standing in formation during the outdoor remembrance service
Army, sea, and air cadets lined up at attention beside memorial headstones
Tri-elemental cadets posing together in dress uniforms at the ceremony grounds
Wide view of attendees paying respects among rows of headstones on a clear autumn day
